title: Sacred Ore
description: This mod adds a new type of ore called Sacred Ore from what can be made a lot of unique artefacts with unique usage
body:
This mod adds a new type of ore called Sacred Ore from what can be made a lot of unique artefacts with unique usage. 

 

 

Subscribe on mod's platforms:

Discord Server

YouTube

Telegram channel

Wiki

VK (Russian) 

 

Sacred Ore blocks and items

 

Sacred Armor, Spear and Shield

Sacred Spear can be throwed like a trident. 

Sacred Helmet can be mixed with a torch to get an option for emit light on your way.

Sacred Shield have 3000 durability.

 

Other Sacred items:

- Holy Water. Clears all bad potion effects.

- Splash Holy Water. Can be throwed. Applies Wither potion effect on victims. 

- Scroll of Undying. Can be used as Totem of Undying. 

- Sacred Cross. Gives Night Vision, Speed III and Strength III for 10 minutes. 10 minutes cooldown.

- Holy Grail. Can be filled with water and drunk to get Speed II, Jump Boost II and Haste II.

 

Sacred Armor can be trimmed and Sacred Ingot can be used as Armor Trim Material.

 

This mod made as a request for one person and was allowed to be released in public.
